summary: Tested 4 fixes for CaseDetail page: (1) Back button navigation, (2) Next Actions section redesign, (3) Document clicking to DocumentViewer, (4) Font size increase. Backend tests: 7/7 passed. Frontend: Most features verified, one issue found with document list rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: Documents not rendered as individual clickable items in right panel. Shows '1 documents' count instead of clickable document list. The caseDocs state appears empty even though API returns documents correctly.

1_back_button_code.evidence: CaseDetail.js line 316 and 323 both use navigate('/dashboard') - NOT window.history.back(). Code verified: onClick={() => navigate('/dashboard')}

2_next_actions_blue_border.evidence: NextActionsPanel.js line 33: borderLeft: '3px solid #1a56db'. Verified via computed styles: border-left: 3px solid rgb(26, 86, 219)

3_next_actions_light_blue_bg.evidence: NextActionsPanel.js line 33: background: '#f0f7ff'. Verified via computed styles: background-color: rgb(240, 247, 255)

4_next_actions_bell_icon.evidence: NextActionsPanel.js line 35: <Bell size={14} color='#1a56db' /> imported from lucide-react

6_action_card_border_1px.evidence: NextActionsPanel.js line 54: border: '1px solid #d1d5db'. Verified via computed styles: border: 1px solid rgb(209, 213, 219)

7_action_card_padding_14px.evidence: NextActionsPanel.js line 54: padding: 14. Verified via computed styles: padding: 14px

9_document_viewer_page.evidence: DocumentViewer.js renders at /documents/:documentId. Shows filename, upload date, size, PDF preview iframe, Archer analysis, Download and Delete buttons. All data-testid attributes present.

10_document_viewer_back_button.evidence: DocumentViewer.js line 56: Back button navigates using navigate(-1)

11_backend_get_document.evidence: GET /api/documents/{document_id} returns document details including file_name, uploaded_at, storage_path, extracted_text

12_backend_delete_document.evidence: DELETE /api/documents/{document_id} returns 404 for non-existent doc, confirming endpoint exists

action_items: INVESTIGATE: Documents not rendering as clickable items in CaseDetail right panel. The caseDocs state is empty even though GET /api/cases/{case_id}/documents returns documents. Check if there's a timing issue or silent error in the fetchData function (line 175 has empty catch block).
critical_code_review_comments: CaseDetail.js line 175: Empty catch block for document fetch - should log errors for debugging
Back button correctly uses navigate('/dashboard') instead of history.back() - verified in code
NextActionsPanel.js implements all required styling: blue left border, light blue bg, bell icon, 15px bold titles, 1px card borders, 14px padding
DocumentViewer.js is a complete implementation with all required features: filename, date, size, preview, Archer analysis, download/delete buttons
Font sizes in CaseDetail.js are consistently 15px for body text as specified

success_rate.frontend: 93% (14/15 features verified, 1 issue with document list rendering)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 fixes tested: (1) Back button uses navigate('/dashboard') - code verified, (2) Next Actions panel has all required styling - verified via computed styles, (3) DocumentViewer page works correctly at /documents/:documentId, (4) Font sizes increased to 15px in CaseDetail.js. One issue: documents not rendering as clickable items in right panel - caseDocs state is empty despite API returning data. The empty catch block on line 175 may be hiding errors.
